name: Pink Marble Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the rhubarb and raspberries in a bowl.
2. Puree them through a food mill or sieve.
3. Place the pureed fruits in a saucepan with sugar and crumbled fig cookies.
4. Heat slowly, stirring constantly until the fig cookies are almost blended into the mixture.
5. When cool, place in the refrigerator to chill.
6. Just before serving, whip the heavy cream with vanilla and confectioners' sugar until stiff peaks form.
7. In dessert glasses, layer the chilled fruit mixture alternately with spoonfuls of whipped cream.
8. Top each glass with a dollop of whipped cream and serve very cold.
Serves 6 to 8.
